title: LLM agent action output schema v0.2
description: Structured action candidate from LLM: action_type, args, optional natural language rationale. Used for constrained decoding and safety shield input.

action_type.description: Engine action type: NOOP, TICK, MOVE, QUEUE_RUN, START_RUN, OPEN_DOOR, RELEASE_RESULT, RELEASE_RESULT_OVERRIDE, etc.

args.description: Action arguments (device_id, work_id, to_zone, result_id, token_refs, etc.)
